name: Search and analyze a directory tree
prompt: Analyze the project/ directory tree and produce search_results.json with the following fields: total_files (number: count of all files recursively), by_extension (object: mapping each file extension like ".ts" to its count), largest_file (string: name of the file with the most content, just the filename not the path), files_containing_TODO (array of strings: filenames of files whose content contains the string "TODO", just filenames not paths), nested_depth (number: the maximum directory nesting depth, where project/ itself is depth 1, project/sub/ is depth 2, etc).

criteria.description: Output file exists and has correct structure
Correct total file count and extension breakdown

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
